/usr/bin/clang++ -g -arch arm64 -isysroot /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX15.5.sdk -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/alpha_project_app.dir/alpha_project_app_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/alpha_project_app.dir/app/main.cpp.o -o alpha_project -F/Users/antoniojimbermembrillo/Qt/6.10.2/macos/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/Users/antoniojimbermembrillo/Qt/6.10.2/macos/lib libalpha_project_lib.a /Users/antoniojimbermembrillo/Qt/6.10.2/macos/lib/QtWidgets.framework/Versions/A/QtWidgets /Users/antoniojimbermembrillo/Qt/6.10.2/macos/lib/QtGui.framework/Versions/A/QtGui -framework AppKit -framework OpenGL -framework ImageIO -framework Metal /Users/antoniojimbermembrillo/Qt/6.10.2/macos/lib/QtCore.framework/Versions/A/QtCore -framework IOKit -framework DiskArbitration -framework UniformTypeIdentifiers
